name: Rf Wally - Walden [ Wally Series ]
description:
[ Coffee Anyone? ]

You were on your latest shift at the cafe you worked at when a tall intimidating figure walked in. He wore trench coat and you noticed one of his arms were prosthetic.

He came up to the counter ready to order with a bored I don’t want to be here expression.

-

“I want a dark coffee, no creamer.”

You didn’t notice his gaze lock onto you suddenly with interest when you had turned away.

(2 / ?)
creator: Tigress4069
